get.description: Public endpoint for the web app to detect whether CE first-run bootstrap is required. No authentication required.

200.description: Bootstrap status for the current edition

get.description: Returns a short-lived one-time token for SSE stream authentication via query parameter.

delete.description: Revokes all refresh tokens and deletes the user. Blocked with 409 when the user is the sole owner of a workspace that has other members.

409.description: Account delete blocked — sole owner of a shared workspace

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile. Email, avatar, and GitHub login are read-only GitHub fields.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name only.

post.description: Public cloud-only endpoint. Creates a subscriber row and sends a double opt-in confirmation email via SMTP.

404.description: Waitlist not available on this edition

get.description: Sets confirmed_at for the subscriber matching the token.

404.description: Token not found or waitlist unavailable

get.description: Sets unsubscribed_at for the subscriber matching the token.

404.description: Token not found or waitlist unavailable

get.summary: List workspaces for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a workspace, auto-generates a slug from the name when omitted, and assigns the creator as owner.

get.description: Public endpoint used during onboarding and workspace settings to verify slug uniqueness.

schema.description: Workspace ID to exclude when checking availability during edits

parameters.description: Workspace ID to exclude when checking availability during edits
parameters.name: exclude

delete.description: Deletes the workspace and cascades related data. Blocked on CE when it is the user's only workspace.

409.description: Cannot delete only workspace on CE

patch.description: Updates name, slug, and default retention (cloud paid plans: 30–365 days).

get.description: Returns API key metadata (prefix only). Requires admin or owner. Full keys are never returned.

post.description: Creates an API key and returns the full `pw_...` value once. Requires admin or owner.

delete.description: Sets `revoked_at` on the key. Requires admin or owner.

get.description: Returns plan, usage, next billing date, and recent invoices. Cloud only; owner-only.

post.description: Starts a subscription checkout for Pro or Business. Cloud only; owner-only.
Opens the billing portal for payment method updates and subscription cancellation. Cloud only; owner-only.

get.description: Returns global health counts and per-repo card data: last run, 7-day failure-rate sparkline, and running pulse flag.
Returns summary cards, per-workflow time series, and slowest/most-failing workflow tables for the selected range.
Returns GitHub integrations with account metadata, connected repo count, and token health. Requires admin or owner.

post.description: Persists a GitHub App installation after callback processing (`provider=github`). Requires admin or owner.

delete.description: Disables all repositories for the integration and removes the integration row. Requires admin or owner.

get.description: Returns a single integration. Requires admin or owner.
Returns pending invites for the workspace. Requires admin or owner.

post.description: Creates a 7-day invite and sends email via SMTP when configured. Returns invite_url when SMTP is unset.
Re-sends the invite email via SMTP when configured. Returns invite_url when SMTP is unset.

get.description: Returns accepted members with role, avatar, email, and joined date. All members have read access.

delete.description: Removes a member from the workspace. Requires admin or owner. Cannot remove the last owner.

patch.description: Updates a member role. Requires admin or owner. Cannot demote the last owner or change your own role.

get.summary: SSE stream for repository pipeline updates
get.description: Server-sent events for run and job updates. Authenticated via one-time query token (PRD §19, page B22).

schema.description: SSE data lines with JSON event payloads

get.description: Returns tracked repositories with visibility and sync settings. Optional filters: enabled, integration_id.

delete.description: Removes the repository row and cascades pipeline runs. Requires admin or owner.

patch.description: Updates enabled flag, polling interval (min 30s), and retention override (plan-clamped on cloud). Requires admin or owner.

403.description: Insufficient permissions or repository limit reached

get.summary: List pipeline runs for a repository
get.description: Returns paginated pipeline runs sorted by started_at desc. Filters: branch, workflow, status, trigger, date range.

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from prior page

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from prior page
parameters.name: cursor

delete.description: Manually purges a pipeline run and cascaded jobs/steps. Requires admin or owner.

get.description: Returns full B6 header fields for a single pipeline run.

get.summary: List pipeline jobs for a run
get.description: Returns jobs ordered for DAG display (started_at asc). Includes runner_name, status, and durations.

404.description: Repository, run, or jobs not found

get.summary: List steps for a pipeline job
get.description: Returns steps ordered by step number within the job.

404.description: Repository, run, job, or steps not found

post.description: Enqueues a backfill-repo job to re-fetch run history from GitHub. Requires admin or owner.

get.summary: Get workspace sync and backfill status
get.description: Returns per-integration and per-repo sync state for onboarding progress and manual re-sync feedback. Optional integrationId filter.

schema.description: Limit results to a single integration

parameters.description: Limit results to a single integration
parameters.name: integrationId

get.description: Redirects the browser to GitHub authorization. Optional `next` query param is preserved for post-auth redirect.

schema.description: Relative or absolute post-auth redirect target

parameters.description: Relative or absolute post-auth redirect target
parameters.name: next

get.description: Exchanges the authorization code, upserts the user, issues JWT + refresh cookies, and redirects to the app.

302.description: Redirect to app after successful sign-in

post.description: Revokes the refresh token from the httpOnly cookie and clears auth cookies. Requires a valid refresh cookie.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated user and clears auth cookies.
Rotates the httpOnly refresh cookie and issues a new access JWT cookie. Requires a valid refresh cookie.
Issues a new access JWT scoped to the requested workspace. Requires a valid refresh cookie and workspace membership.

204.description: Workspace switched; new access cookie issued

403.description: Not a member of the requested workspace

get.description: Public liveness probe — no authentication required.
Public endpoint to validate an invite before sign-in or acceptance (pages B18).

post.description: Creates workspace membership for the authenticated user whose email matches the invite.

409.description: Invite already accepted or user already a member

get.description: Accepts GitHub `installation_id` after App install (or CE manual entry), upserts the integration, enqueues backfill, and redirects to onboarding step 3 (PRD §12.1, pages B17).

schema.description: GitHub App installation ID from the install redirect or CE manual entry

parameters.description: GitHub App installation ID from the install redirect or CE manual entry
parameters.name: installation_id

403.description: Insufficient permissions or missing workspace context

409.description: Installation already connected to another workspace

post.description: Validates `X-Hub-Signature-256`, enqueues `workflow_run` and `workflow_job` events to BullMQ, and returns 200 immediately (PRD §12.6, pages B19).

post.summary: Postmark bounce and unsubscribe webhook receiver
post.description: Validates `X-Postmark-Signature` (HMAC-SHA256, base64), updates `subscribers` on bounce and unsubscribe events, and returns 200 immediately (pages B21, PRD §14).
Validates `Stripe-Signature`, syncs workspace plan and subscription fields for billing lifecycle events, and returns 200 immediately (PRD §24, pages B20). Cloud only.

key.description: Full API key — shown once at creation; store securely.

sparkline.description: Daily failure rate (0–100) for the last 7 UTC days, oldest first

polling_interval_seconds.description: null switches to webhook mode; minimum 30 when set

bearerAuth.description: Short-lived JWT from GitHub OAuth. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

apiKeyAuth.description: Workspace API key. Send as `Authorization: Bearer pw_<key>`.

info.title: PipeWatch API
info.description: PipeWatch REST API for workspace-scoped CI pipeline monitoring. Authenticate with a browser session JWT or a workspace API key (`pw_` prefix).
